title: Sage Broil Bowl
description: This earthy and velvety Japanese-inspired brunch dish features sage broiled with tofu for a kosher-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: Soy Sauce
ingredients.amount: a few tablespoons, optional for dipping

instructions: Chop shiitake mushrooms and slice finely.
In a bowl, combine tofu with olive oil, sage, salt, pepper, and the vegetable broth. Mix well until all pieces are coated.
Arrange tofu mixture in a baking dish. Bake for 25 minutes or until golden brown.
Toast green onions on a separate pan until crisp-tender.
Drizzle soy sauce over the broiled tofu if desired.
Serve sage tofu bowl topped with shiitake mushrooms, green onions, and more soy sauce.
